creator: dikshie@lapi.itb.ac.id
text:
ports/net/ssmping work on FreeBSD-6.x
BUT broken on FreeBSD-7.x and 8.x.  


on FreeBSD-6.4
asmping -6 ff7e:140:2001:200:0:6013::1 2001:200:0:6013::36
[admin@ganesha] /usr/ports/net/mcast-tools# asmping -6 ff7e:140:2001:200:0:6013::1 2001:200:0:6013::36
asmping joined (S,G) = (*,ff7e:140:2001:200:0:6013:4321:1234)
pinging 2001:200:0:6013::36 from 2001:d30:3:0:250:bfff:fe21:980e
  unicast from 2001:200:0:6013::36, seq=1 dist=7 time=121.468 ms
  unicast from 2001:200:0:6013::36, seq=2 dist=7 time=123.099 ms
  unicast from 2001:200:0:6013::36, seq=3 dist=7 time=122.609 ms
  unicast from 2001:200:0:6013::36, seq=4 dist=7 time=122.231 ms
  unicast from 2001:200:0:6013::36, seq=5 dist=7 time=126.004 ms
  unicast from 2001:200:0:6013::36, seq=6 dist=7 time=121.119 ms
  unicast from 2001:200:0:6013::36, seq=7 dist=7 time=122.088 ms
  unicast from 2001:200:0:6013::36, seq=8 dist=7 time=121.545 ms
^C
--- 2001:200:0:6013::36 statistics ---
8 packets transmitted, time 7230 ms
unicast:
   8 packets received, 0% packet loss
   rtt min/avg/max/std-dev = 121.119/122.520/126.004/1.479 ms
multicast:
   0 packets received, 100% packet loss


on FreeBSD-7.2
#sfc-cpu.ai3.net
asmping -6 ff7e:140:2001:200:0:6013::1 2001:200:0:6013::36
Failed to join multicast group: Protocol not available
errno=42

Fix: 

this ports should be marked broken for FreeBSD-7.x and FreeBSD-8.x
How-To-Repeat: enable your MROUTING in kernel. 
install ports/net/ssmping
and join to multicast group
